docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $649.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT JEANNETTE RICHARDSON.
